title: DID document includes ATProto PDS service entry but this is not an ATProto server
description: In src/did.rs lines 111-115, the DID document includes a `service` block declaring this server as an `AtprotoPersonalDataServer`. Smallhold is an ActivityPub server, not an ATProto/Bluesky PDS. This service entry is misleading: ATProto clients that resolve the DID document will attempt to connect to this domain as a PDS and fail. Either remove the ATProto service entry entirely, or replace it with an ActivityPub-relevant service entry (e.g., type `ActivityPubService` pointing to the user's actor URL). If future ATProto bridging is planned, this should be conditional on configuration, not unconditional.
